## Small example of antibody response curve parameters for typhoid {.unnumbered}


### Description

A subset of data from the SEES study, for examples and testing.



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>typhoid_curves_nostrat_100
</code></pre>


### Format



<h4><code>typhoid_curves_nostrat_100</code></h4>

A <code>curve_params</code> object (from <code>as_sr_params()</code>) with 500 rows and 7
columns:


<dl>
<dt>antigen_iso</dt><dd>which antigen and isotype are being measured
(data is in long format)
</dd>
<dt>iter</dt><dd>MCMC iteration
</dd>
<dt>y0</dt><dd>Antibody concentration at t = 0 (start of active infection)
</dd>
<dt>y1</dt><dd>Antibody concentration at t = <code>t1</code> (end of active infection)
</dd>
<dt>t1</dt><dd>Duration of active infection
</dd>
<dt>alpha</dt><dd>Antibody decay rate coefficient
</dd>
<dt>r</dt><dd>Antibody decay rate exponent parameter
</dd>
</dl>




### Source

<a href="https://osf.io/rtw5k">https://osf.io/rtw5k</a>
